description_long: This is a modern bolt-action sniper rifle with a long, precision-machined barrel and a tactical chassis. The stock is adjustable and features a cheek rest, with a thumbhole design for ergonomic handling. The receiver and barrel are robust, likely made from steel or a high-strength alloy, and the forend is ribbed for improved grip and heat dissipation. The rifle has a prominent bolt handle and a detachable magazine well beneath the action. There are no visible optics or iron sights mounted, and the muzzle appears to lack any additional device such as a brake or suppressor. The overall finish is matte black, giving it a tactical, non-reflective appearance.
description: A modern, matte black bolt-action sniper rifle with a long barrel, adjustable thumbhole stock, and ribbed forend. It features a detachable magazine and lacks visible sights or muzzle devices.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the adjustable stock, thumbhole grip, bolt handle, and ribbed forend.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the circular muzzle and the narrow profile of the barrel and forend.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the stock, grip, and magazine well.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the buttstock and the alignment of the barrel, with the bolt handle slightly visible.
